curation_notes: Patch modifies 2 source files: src/api/users.js (adds type whitelist validation in generateExport) and src/socket.io/user/profile.js (replaces object spread with explicit property pick in doExport). Both are primary locations. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern. Pre-assigned class path-traversal (CWE-22) is correct — the unvalidated type parameter is interpolated into a file path for child_process.fork().
